name: glaurung-a0-five-policy-sweep-v3
purpose: Rerun the complete five-policy scalar A0 sweep over the independently validated positive control and fixed tcpip discovery boundary after model-independent stack-region classification repaired v2's maximum-policy false positive.

excluded_resource_frontier.reason: All four min-unsigned v1 authority processes hit the preregistered 300-second wall-clock safety deadline; preserving complete usbprint in the all-policy matrix would require outcome-adaptive bounds.
excluded_resource_frontier.follow_up: Preregister a separate bounded usbprint function/work frontier; do not relabel the AnyModel-complete boundary as policy invariant.

axeyum_source_policy: Run from one clean detached commit containing this unchanged preregistration, runner, measurement harness, validator, and analyzer.

detector_correction.accepted_result: 14/14 expected high-confidence findings, zero false negatives, zero unexpected high-confidence findings, and exact sole-authority parity in both repetitions

policies.label: site-hash-1
policies.role: complementary deterministic site-stable mixed extremum schedule

acceptance.source_and_binary_identity: Every source tree, authority binary, manifest, and driver hash must match exactly and remain clean/stable.
acceptance.positive_control: Every policy/backend cell must reproduce all 14 independently validated findings with zero false negatives and zero unexpected high-confidence rows.
acceptance.authority_parity: Every cell must have stable, exact high-confidence finding parity between sole Z3 and sole Axeyum authority.
acceptance.work: Repetitions, order, environment, coverage boundary, solve counts, and policy telemetry must pass the fail-closed analyzer.
acceptance.discovery: No direction or magnitude of tcpip policy variation is an acceptance gate. Raw, high-confidence, and diagnostic populations are retained verbatim and remain unlabeled until independently validated.

claim_limits: The positive control is a planted regression denominator, not representative real-driver recall or prevalence.
Tcpip is an unlabeled discovery population and does not establish true or false positives without separate source and machine validation.
Complete usbprint failed the v1 policy-resource boundary and is excluded transparently, not counted as a zero or successful cell.
The campaign measures integration work and cost descriptively; it is not a solver-speed comparison.
BoundarySet and DiverseEnum are not executable at 7f682e5 and are excluded rather than approximated by a single boundary choice.
Symbolic or symcrete memory is memory-model work and remains gated on a measured validated coverage gap after the policy sweep.
